LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS MICHAEL MORTENSEN AND MARIA MORTENSEN'S MOTION TO STRIKE REQUEST FOR EXEMPLARY DAMAGES FROM COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COMPLAINT FAILS TO PLEAD FACTS SUFFICIENT TO SUPPORT A CLAIM FOR EXEMPLARY DAMAGES BECAUSE THE PLEADED FACTS DO NOT DEMONSTRATE THE DEFENDANTS ACTED WITH OPPRESSION, FRAUD, OR MALICE PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 3294(A). PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR # 5976 (302)

Notice Of Motion Of Defendants Michael William Mortensen, Maria Elena Mortensens Motion To Strike Request For Exemplary Damages From First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-19-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion Of Defendants Michael William Mortensen, Maria Elena Mortensens Motion To Strike Request For Exemplary Damages From First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-02-2015 Continued To Mar-04-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS MICHAEL MORTENSEN AND MARIA MORTENSEN's Motion To Strike Request For Exemplary Damages From First Amended Complaint is continued on the Court's motion to March 4, 2015. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2014 Continued To Mar-25-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-06-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS MICHAEL MORTENSEN and MARIA MORTENSEN's MOTION TO STRIKE REQUEST FOR EXEMPLARY DAMAGES FROM COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. The Complaint fails to plead facts sufficient to support a claim for exemplary damages because the pleaded facts do not demonstrate the Defendants acted with oppression, fraud, or malice pursuant to Civil Code section 3294(a). Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)
